mapper.select: select count(1) from lkt_configure as a left join lkt_product_list as b on a.pid = b.id left join lkt_mch as c on b.mch_id = c.id

SELECT a.product_number, a.product_title, a.min_inventory, a.imgurl, a. STATUS, a.mch_id, a.upper_shelf_time, c.id, c.pid, c.price, c.attribute, c.total_num, c.num, max(b.add_date) warningDate, m. NAME AS shop_name FROM lkt_configure AS c INNER JOIN lkt_product_list AS a ON c.pid = a.id LEFT JOIN lkt_mch AS m ON a.mch_id = m.id LEFT JOIN lkt_stock AS b ON c.id = b.attribute_id
c.id,
warningDate ${price_sort},
LIMIT #{pageStart},#{pageEnd}
SELECT count(distinct c.id) FROM lkt_configure AS c INNER JOIN lkt_product_list AS a ON c.pid = a.id LEFT JOIN lkt_mch AS m ON a.mch_id = m.id LEFT JOIN lkt_stock AS b ON c.id = b.attribute_id

SELECT a.attr_id, a.id, a.product_title, a.num FROM (
SELECT a.id AS attr_id, b.id, b.product_title, a.num, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY b.id) as top FROM lkt_configure AS a LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list AS b ON a.pid = b.id LEFT JOIN lkt_mch AS c ON b.mch_id = c.id WHERE b.store_id = #{storeId} AND c.store_id = b.store_id AND b.active = 1 AND b.STATUS = 2 AND a.num > 0 AND b.id = #{goodsId} ) AS a WHERE a.top = 1
